chapter_title.ar: باب مَا لِلْإِنْسَانِ أَنْ يُوصِيَ بِهِ بَعْدَ مَوْتِهِ وَ مَا يُسْتَحَبُّ لَهُ مِنْ ذَلِكَ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 6 – What is for the human being that he bequeaths after his death, and what is recommended from that

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/21)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (23/21)
text: مَنْ أَوْصَى بِالثُّلُثِ فَقَدْ أَضَرَّ بِالْوَرَثَةِ وَ الْوَصِيَّةُ بِالْخُمُسِ وَ الرُّبُعِ أَفْضَلُ مِنَ الْوَصِيَّةِ بِالثُّلُثِ وَ مَنْ أَوْصَى بِالثُّلُثِ فَلَمْ يَتَّرِكْ .

en.hubeali: Al Husayn Bin Muhammad, from Moala Bin Muhammad, and Muhammad Bin Yahya, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, both together, from Al Washa, from Hamaad Bin Usman,

Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> has said: ‘The one who bequeaths with a third, so he has harmed the inheritors, and the bequeathing with a fifth and the fourth is better than the bequeathing with the third; and the one who bequeaths with a third, so he has not left out anything’.
en.sarwar: 5. Al-Husayn ibn Muhammad has narrated from Mu‘alla’ ibn Muhammad and Muhammad ibn Yahya has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad all from al-Washsha’ from Hammad ibn ‘Uthaman who has narrated the following: “Abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘If one makes a will about one-third of his legacy he has harmed the heirs. Making a will about one-fifth or one-fourth of the legacy is better than making a will about one-third. If one makes a will about one-third he has not left anything (for the heirs).’”
